label: Gen step asteroid
description: Generates an asteroid map with noise-shaped terrain, ore lumps, optional ruins, and an archean tree.

mineableCounts.label: Mineable counts
mineableCounts.description: List of mineable types with their count ranges for ore generation.

numChunks.label: Num chunks
numChunks.description: Random range for the number of ore lump chunks to scatter.

ruinsChance.label: Ruins chance
ruinsChance.description: Probability (0-1) that ruins are generated on the asteroid.

archeanTreeChance.label: Archean tree chance
archeanTreeChance.description: Probability (0-1) that an archean tree grove is generated on the asteroid.
